news.summary: China Mobile and ZTE recently collaborated on an AI-driven project aimed at enhancing the efficiency of 5G networks. This initiative focuses on reducing energy consumption and boosting network performance. By implementing cutting-edge technology, the project aims to enhance operation efficiency as well. This innovative AI-driven green and energy-saving 5G cloudified core network project signifies a pivotal advancement in the telecommunications sector.
news.headline: China Mobile and ZTE win Asia Mobile Award for AI-driven 5G network project, reducing energy consumption and improving efficiency.

news.summary: A renowned Experience Management consulting firm based in SEMINOLE, Fla has recently received recognition for its exceptional employee engagement and commitment to a remote-first culture on June 19, 2025. Farlinium, specializing in Experience Management (XM), was honored as one of Inc.'s Best Workplaces, showcasing their dedication to creating a positive work environment. The firm's efforts have not gone unnoticed, solidifying their position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: Farlinium named on Inc.'s 2025 Best Workplaces ranking for exceptional employee engagement. Located in SEMINOLE, Fla.

news.summary: During the time span between Memorial Day and Labor Day, parents play a crucial role in saving lives. This period, known as the "100 deadliest days" due to increased summer activities, poses significant risks. It is essential for parents to be vigilant and proactive during this time.
news.headline: Mercury Insurance provides 5 tips for parents to discuss safe driving with teens during the risky 100 days between Memorial Day and Labor Day.

news.summary: AMG, a top private psychiatric practice in North Carolina and Florida, is launching its telemedicine mental health services again. This initiative aims to provide accessible and personalized psychiatric care to communities. The announcement was made in Wilmington, N.C. on June 19, 2025.
news.headline: AMG expands mental healthcare access in NC and FL with telemedicine services, open to new patients.

news.summary: The Lopez family recently unveiled their latest Nuttall's store in Layton, Utah, marking a significant event for the BERNINA brand. The grand opening event welcomed distinguished BERNINA representatives and introduced a range of new products, classes, and a community space. Located in Layton, Utah, the store's launch took place on June 19, 2025. Nuttall's Sewing Centers, recognized as one of the leading BERNINA dealers nationwide, has solidified its presence with this new establishment. This development showcases the family's commitment to providing quality sewing solutions in the region.
news.headline: Nuttall's Sewing Centers unveils new Layton location in Utah, welcomes BERNINA leadership, offers new products and classes.

news.summary: A bankruptcy auction organized by Auction Advisors will feature a premium Italian wine portfolio, a fast-growing canned cocktail brand Lido Limone, and additional related assets. The auction is set to take place on July 15, 2025, with a deadline for bidder qualification on July 11, 2025. The case number for the auction is 1:25-bk-10870 as per the United States Bankruptcy Court.
news.headline: Bankruptcy auction of premium Italian wine, Lido Limone cocktail brand & assets on July 15, 2025. Case No. 1:25-bk-10870.

news.summary: A global media organization recently highlighted its achievements in utilizing the Skyvia data integration platform for automated newsletter distribution and web analytics monitoring. The success story was shared in Prague on June 19, 2025. Skyvia, known as the top data integration platform, detailed how their services contributed to the organization's operations. This update was released via PRNewswire-PRWeb.
news.headline: Project Syndicate streamlines operations with Skyvia across 450+ partners for automated campaign insights.

news.summary: Resolver, a Kroll Business, has announced an enhanced collaboration with the Internet Watch Foundation (IWF) to bolster efforts in preventing online harm across platforms. The partnership aims to improve identification, reporting, and disruption of Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM) on a large scale. This alliance is a part of Resolver's commitment to combatting illicit content online. The company operates from LEEDS, England, and the initiative is set to make a significant impact in safeguarding online environments.
news.headline: Resolver celebrates 10 years collaborating with IWF in combatting online child abuse, enhancing efforts in identifying and disrupting CSAM at scale.

news.summary: AM Xavier and his wife opted to raise their children without the influence of modern technology. This choice shaped a lifestyle for their two sons, centered around art, music, reading, and nature, devoid of screens. The boys were immersed in a screen-free environment, fostering a unique upbringing focused on traditional activities.
news.headline: Entrepreneur AM Xavier writes series on chipmunk brothers to promote culture adventures over tech for his screen-free kids.

news.summary: Cargas, a software company owned by its employees and a longstanding partner of Microsoft, has been recognized by Microsoft as a Solutions Partner for Business Applications in the small and mid-sized business segment. This acknowledgment highlights Cargas' proficiency in Dynamics 365.
news.headline: Cargas earns Microsoft Solutions Partner designation for Business Applications, showcasing expertise in Dynamics 365.

news.summary: eG Innovations has launched the new eG Enterprise v7.5, providing comprehensive support for Dizzion DaaS and Dizzion Cloud PC. This enhances its observability features across various digital workspace platforms. The release was announced in Iselin, N.J. on June 19, 2025. This update showcases the company's commitment to broadening its capabilities, catering to a wider range of platforms for enhanced digital workspace monitoring and management.
news.headline: eG Innovations enhances monitoring with native support for Dizzion DaaS and Cloud PC in latest release. #technews #observability

news.summary: Summer is synonymous with hosting barbeques, pool parties, and social events. Surprisingly, wood decks are demonstrating superior practicality compared to composite decking. Over its lifespan, a wood deck is expected to withstand wear and tear more effectively.
news.headline: Sansin releases article favoring real wood over composite decking for summer activities due to superior experience and lifespan.

news.summary: Cessie C. Communications, a top boutique PR and social media influencer marketing firm known for its expertise in luxury travel, hospitality, and lifestyle sectors, has been selected as the official U.S. public relations agency for the Nevis Tourism Authority (NTA). This partnership marks a significant milestone for both parties, with Cessie C. Communications set to spearhead PR efforts aimed at promoting Nevis as a premier travel destination. The collaboration is expected to bring increased visibility to NTA in the U.S. market, leveraging Cessie C. Communications' proven track record and extensive network.
news.headline: Cessie C. Communications becomes U.S. PR agency for Nevis Tourism Authority. Specializes in luxury travel, hospitality, lifestyle.

news.summary: Crowley and Puerto Rico Governor Jenniffer González-Colón marked a significant achievement as they celebrated the inaugural voyage of the first U.S.-flagged liquefied natural gas carrier to transport U.S.-sourced LNG to Puerto Rico. The event took place in PEÑUELAS, Puerto Rico on June 19, 2025. This milestone highlights the successful cooperation between the two parties to bring LNG to Puerto Rico, signaling a positive step towards enhancing energy security. The carrier's journey signifies a crucial development in the energy sector, with the vessel playing a pivotal role in delivering LNG to the region. The operation underscores the commitment to promoting sustainability and energy diversification. The U.S.-owned shipping company's accomplishment and partnership with Puerto Rico underscore the growing importance of LNG in the region, with significant implications for future energy strategies.
news.headline: First US-flagged LNG carrier delivers US-sourced LNG to Puerto Rico. Celebrated by Gov. González-Colón and Crowley.

news.summary: A grant of $1.5 million from the New Jersey Economic Development Authority has enabled FUN, a cultural celebration in Newark, to come to life. Through FESTIVALS UNITED NEWARK (FUN), a lineup of outdoor festivals for 2025 has been unveiled. The event promises to bring the community together for a series of vibrant and entertaining celebrations.
news.headline: Festivals United Newark (FUN) launched today at Harriet Tubman Square Park with a $1.5 million grant from NJEDA.

news.summary: Bagmasters has kicked off a fresh summer sale, slashing prices by a remarkable 61% on a wide selection of over 100 promotional items. This exclusive deal presents a rare opportunity for businesses, event organizers, and individuals to imprint their logos on premium merchandise at significantly reduced rates. The promotion is set to take place in CORONA, Calif., starting June 19, 2025.
news.headline: Bagmasters' summer sale offers up to 61% off on 100+ promo products, enabling businesses to brand items at a reduced cost.

news.summary: Today, PSQuote, the top professional services quoting tool integrated with Salesforce, revealed the selection of Joey Poarch as CEO. This change in leadership aligns with the company's planned separation from CLD Partners, a prominent Salesforce, PSA & Quote-to-Cash consulting firm.
news.headline: PSQuote appoints Joey Poarch as CEO & announces spin-out from CLD Partners for improved services on Salesforce.

news.summary: Promptfoo has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 100,000 users. The company has also unveiled the latest version of its AI red teaming platform, tailored to evaluate and safeguard enterprise-level LLM agent systems. This announcement was made in San Francisco on June 19, 2025.
news.headline: Promptfoo reaches 100,000 users and introduces next-gen red teaming for LLM agents to enhance security.

news.summary: Privileged Access Management leader, Admin By Request, has recently inaugurated a state-of-the-art datacenter in Singapore, a strategic move in bolstering its operations in Southeast Asia while adhering to local data regulations. This new facility aims to enhance performance for regional clients, further solidifying the company's commitment to the market.
news.headline: Admin By Request expands with new datacenter in Singapore, enhancing presence in Southeast Asia and ensuring compliance with local data regulations.
